Promote
Marketing playbookPosting basicsRaton eventsTrinidad eventsHuerfano eventsColfax adsLas Animas adsHuerfano adsTemplates
Submit Update
Home/Amplifiers

Regional Amplifier Channels

Newsletters, calendars, directories, and visitor guides.

Use this page to decide where an event, listing, announcement, partnership ask, or visitor-facing update may belong. Open the page before assuming current rates, deadlines, or acceptance rules.

What each side is for

Choose a channel type, then open its directory.

Event calendars

Public, time-sensitive things: performances, markets, workshops, launches, fundraisers, and visitor-facing events.

Open event calendar sources

Newsletters and mailing lists

Opt-in audiences and update lists; ask before assuming outside announcements, free placement, or ads are accepted.

Open newsletter sources

Business directories

Business, attraction, gallery, lodging, dining, service, and organization listings that stay useful after an announcement passes.

Open directory sources

Tourism and visitor guides

Visitor-facing lodging, dining, shopping, galleries, attractions, recreation, and seasonal campaign routes.

Open visitor-guide sources

Anchor venue lineups

Arts, music, theater, food, gallery, and event-adjacent cross-promotion routes.

Open venue sources

Ask about advertising or placement

Channels where ads, classifieds, sponsorships, social media co-op, paid placement, or editorial fit need a direct ask.

Open ad inquiry sources

Each box jumps to a public-source list below. Confirm rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, and acceptance with the source owner.

Search all amplifier channels

Search the same channel types from the boxes above.

Use this when you know the category, county, town, or source name but do not want to scan every row.

Search all amplifier rows by category, county, town, or source name.

ChannelArea servedChannel typeWhat users can ask or submitBest forHow to use it
Red River Brewing Company & DistilleryRed River / ColfaxOwn-site newsletter / mailing listAsk about newsletter signup, promotion fit, and any business-originating mailing-list opportunity.Visitor-facing food, beverage, live-music, and Red River event awareness.Use as proof that local businesses can have their own audiences; ask before sending promotional material.
Angel Fire Resort EventsAngel Fire / ColfaxEvents calendar; calendar subscription; newsletter signupCheck event fit, calendar options, and newsletter signup path.Resort-adjacent events, seasonal tourism, outdoor recreation, food, lodging, and visitor activity.Treat as a visitor/venue channel; confirm listing eligibility and deadlines before promising placement.
Angel Fire Resort Vacation RentalsAngel Fire / ColfaxEvents referral; newsletter signupAsk whether local events, lodging partners, or visitor resources can be shared.Lodging-adjacent tourism campaigns and visitor-facing event discovery.Use as a lodging-audience lead, not as confirmed submission access.
Red River Chamber / RedRiver.org EventsRed River / ColfaxEvents calendar; submit event; newsletter; vacation guideSubmit local visitor-friendly events and ask about guide or newsletter fit.Public events, festivals, arts, family activities, outdoor recreation, and visitor-facing promotions.Use for visitor-friendly events; do not imply all business promotions qualify.
Red River Chamber Vacation GuideRed River / ColfaxVacation guide request; visitor mailing pathway; newsletterAsk about visitor-guide listing or advertising requirements, deadlines, and eligibility.Tourism businesses, lodging, dining, attractions, and seasonal visitor campaigns.Treat as a guide pathway; confirm whether listing, advertising, or editorial inclusion is available.
Visit Angel Fire NM Get ListedAngel Fire / ColfaxBusiness listing intake; event submission; newsletter signupSubmit eligible properties/listings or ask about event/listing pathways.Visitor-facing businesses, rentals, events, and tourism services.Use the public form path where it fits; confirm approval and listing scope.
Visit Angel Fire EventsAngel Fire / ColfaxEvents calendar; list your event; calendar subscription; newsletterSubmit local events and prepare clean event data, images, and contact details.Community events, visitor events, arts, recreation, classes, and seasonal programming.Use alongside the dedicated list-your-event page when available.
Visit Trinidad Tourism / Resources for LocalsTrinidad / Las AnimasMarketing support; social media co-op; community calendar; business directory requestAsk about event support, attraction/business listings, co-promotion, and community calendar fit.Trinidad tourism businesses, events, attractions, visitor experiences, and local organizations.Good first stop for visitor-facing Trinidad activity; follow the posted intake paths.
Visit Trinidad Submit EventTrinidad / Las AnimasEvent submission rules / approval processSubmit events for review with complete public details and images.Public events, festivals, arts events, community programs, and visitor-relevant activities.Use for event submission only; approval and timing belong to the site owner.
City of Trinidad Economic DevelopmentTrinidad / Las AnimasEconomic-development newsletter; business news/resources/eventsAsk how to receive updates or share business-resource news.Business support, city economic-development awareness, and resource updates.Use as an official update source; confirm submission or signup process before directing users.
Main Street LIVETrinidad / Las AnimasEvents calendar; season lineup; special eventsAsk about event partnership, venue calendar fit, sponsorship, or audience alignment.Performances, arts events, venue partnerships, and cultural programming.Use as a venue/arts channel; confirm whether outside events or promotions are accepted.
Main Street LIVE 2026 CalendarTrinidad / Las AnimasCalendar / ticketed event lineupCheck schedule fit and ask about partnership or listing opportunities.Arts, music, theater, and event-timing awareness.Use for planning around known events and understanding audience timing.
Spanish Peaks Country NewsletterHuerfano County / Walsenburg / La Veta / CucharaNewsletter; events calendar; submit event; business directory; add listingAsk about event submission, directory listing, newsletter signup, and visitor-guide pathways.Tourism businesses, galleries, museums, lodging, dining, events, and seasonal campaigns.Strong Huerfano amplifier because it connects directory, events, and visitor audiences.
Spanish Peaks Country Business DirectoryHuerfano CountyBusiness directory; add business listingSubmit or update eligible business listings.Visitor-facing Huerfano businesses, galleries, museums, lodging, dining, shopping, and attractions.Use before creating a manual Huerfano visitor-economy list.
Spanish Peaks Country Submit EventHuerfano CountySubmit event; event calendarSubmit events with clean title, timing, location, description, contact, and image.Public events, arts, markets, festivals, classes, and visitor-facing activities.Use for calendar placement requests; confirm review time and event fit.
World JournalHuerfano / WalsenburgNewspaper, events, classifieds, advertising inquiry possibleAsk about story coverage, event listings, classifieds, legal notices, advertising, and deadlines.Huerfano announcements, event awareness, local stories, public notices, and paid-media inquiries.Do not imply free publication; ask directly about rates, editorial fit, and deadlines.
La Veta Creative DistrictLa Veta / HuerfanoEvents/festivals, arts visibility, possible mailing/newsAsk about arts events, festival participation, listings, partner sharing, or newsletter options.Artists, galleries, makers, workshops, performances, and creative-sector partnerships.Use as an arts-sector relationship lead; confirm submission and promotion channels.

Amplifier directory

Event calendars

Public, time-sensitive things: performances, markets, workshops, launches, fundraisers, visitor-facing activities, and community events.

Search this category.

Red River / ColfaxOwn-site newsletter / mailing list

Red River Brewing Company & Distillery

Visitor-facing food, beverage, live-music, and Red River event awareness.

Ask about newsletter signup, promotion fit, and any business-originating mailing-list opportunity.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Angel Fire / ColfaxEvents calendar; calendar subscription; newsletter signup

Angel Fire Resort Events

Resort-adjacent events, seasonal tourism, outdoor recreation, food, lodging, and visitor activity.

Check event fit, calendar options, and newsletter signup path.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Angel Fire / ColfaxEvents referral; newsletter signup

Angel Fire Resort Vacation Rentals

Lodging-adjacent tourism campaigns and visitor-facing event discovery.

Ask whether local events, lodging partners, or visitor resources can be shared.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Red River / ColfaxEvents calendar; submit event; newsletter; vacation guide

Red River Chamber / RedRiver.org Events

Public events, festivals, arts, family activities, outdoor recreation, and visitor-facing promotions.

Submit local visitor-friendly events and ask about guide or newsletter fit.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Angel Fire / ColfaxBusiness listing intake; event submission; newsletter signup

Visit Angel Fire NM Get Listed

Visitor-facing businesses, rentals, events, and tourism services.

Submit eligible properties/listings or ask about event/listing pathways.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Angel Fire / ColfaxEvents calendar; list your event; calendar subscription; newsletter

Visit Angel Fire Events

Community events, visitor events, arts, recreation, classes, and seasonal programming.

Submit local events and prepare clean event data, images, and contact details.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Trinidad / Las AnimasMarketing support; social media co-op; community calendar; business directory request

Visit Trinidad Tourism / Resources for Locals

Trinidad tourism businesses, events, attractions, visitor experiences, and local organizations.

Ask about event support, attraction/business listings, co-promotion, and community calendar fit.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Trinidad / Las AnimasEvent submission rules / approval process

Visit Trinidad Submit Event

Public events, festivals, arts events, community programs, and visitor-relevant activities.

Submit events for review with complete public details and images.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Trinidad / Las AnimasEconomic-development newsletter; business news/resources/events

City of Trinidad Economic Development

Business support, city economic-development awareness, and resource updates.

Ask how to receive updates or share business-resource news.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Trinidad / Las AnimasEvents calendar; season lineup; special events

Main Street LIVE

Performances, arts events, venue partnerships, and cultural programming.

Ask about event partnership, venue calendar fit, sponsorship, or audience alignment.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Trinidad / Las AnimasCalendar / ticketed event lineup

Main Street LIVE 2026 Calendar

Arts, music, theater, and event-timing awareness.

Check schedule fit and ask about partnership or listing opportunities.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Huerfano County / Walsenburg / La Veta / CucharaNewsletter; events calendar; submit event; business directory; add listing

Spanish Peaks Country Newsletter

Tourism businesses, galleries, museums, lodging, dining, events, and seasonal campaigns.

Ask about event submission, directory listing, newsletter signup, and visitor-guide pathways.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Huerfano CountySubmit event; event calendar

Spanish Peaks Country Submit Event

Public events, arts, markets, festivals, classes, and visitor-facing activities.

Submit events with clean title, timing, location, description, contact, and image.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Huerfano / WalsenburgNewspaper, events, classifieds, advertising inquiry possible

World Journal

Huerfano announcements, event awareness, local stories, public notices, and paid-media inquiries.

Ask about story coverage, event listings, classifieds, legal notices, advertising, and deadlines.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

La Veta / HuerfanoEvents/festivals, arts visibility, possible mailing/news

La Veta Creative District

Artists, galleries, makers, workshops, performances, and creative-sector partnerships.

Ask about arts events, festival participation, listings, partner sharing, or newsletter options.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoCommunity calendar

Bachman Community Calendar

Farmers markets and recurring local event timing across La Veta, Cuchara, Gardner, and Walsenburg.

Use to avoid calendar conflicts and find offline outreach opportunities.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Las AnimasRegional chamber

Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber

Member directory, community articles, event calendar, local products, and the cross-state regional chamber frame.

Use as the first regional business network shortcut for Trinidad and neighboring counties.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Las AnimasCreative district

CREATE Trinidad

Artists, entrepreneurs, Space to Create, creative projects, events, and rentals.

Use for creative-economy partnerships and Trinidad arts visibility.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxTourism / events

Explore Raton

Visitor-facing eat, stay, shop, arts, events, and tourism context.

Use when a business or artist can benefit from visitor traffic.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxEvent calendar

Explore Raton Events

Signature events, local happenings, seasonal activity, and tourism timing.

Check before scheduling a launch, show, promotion, or fundraiser.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoChamber / events

Huerfano County Chamber

Networking, education, promotion, advocacy, events, membership, and countywide business exposure.

Use for business collaboration and event promotion in Walsenburg, La Veta, Cuchara, Gardner, and Aguilar.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoCounty government

Huerfano County Government

County offices, public notices, events, affiliated agencies, and official Huerfano context.

Use for official Huerfano County source check and public-notice routing.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxMedia / advertising

KRTN Enchanted Air Radio

Radio advertising, community calendars, regional reach, and public announcements.

Use when an event or offer needs Colfax plus southern Colorado reach.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoCreative district

La Veta Creative District

Creative spaces, festivals, workshops, art shows, performances, and artist resources.

Use for creative-sector partnerships and event timing in La Veta/Cuchara.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalCreative economy listing update

NM Creative Industries Resource Submission / Update

Self-submitted or corrected creative-industry resources, including businesses, services, spaces, events, arts districts, programs, and organizations.

Use this when a creative business, gallery, maker, venue, nonprofit, or program should be added or corrected in the statewide creative resource layer.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxDowntown / events

Raton MainStreet

Downtown events, storefront activity, volunteers, sponsors, and Main Street business visibility.

Use for downtown locations, event collaboration, and historic-district visibility.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoMunicipal forms / vendor permits

Walsenburg Forms and License Applications

Business license, food vendor, peddler, solicitor, liquor, special-event, and local application paths.

Use before telling a Walsenburg vendor, event organizer, or business which city form may be needed.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxMember business directory

Angel Fire Chamber Member Business Directory

Angel Fire and Moreno Valley businesses, nonprofits, artists, lodging, dining, services, and chamber member categories.

Use as a broader Angel Fire directory before searching by category or building a manual list.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalArtist directory

Artists Sunday Artist Directory

Artists and makers seeking a broader public artist directory, including existing La Veta-area examples.

Use as a supplemental discovery and listing path for regional artists; verify current signup rules before recommending.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxMunicipal business resources

City of Raton Business Services

Official Raton business services, permits, licenses, economic development, and support pages.

Use as the official city business hub; if a direct directory path changes, start here.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxStartup / economic-development resource directory

City of Raton Economic Development Programs

Raton and Colfax startup paths, SBA/SBDC/SCORE/FastTrac links, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, and related support routes.

Use when someone needs a first route into business support rather than a single directory listing.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Las AnimasRegional chamber

Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber

Member directory, community articles, event calendar, local products, and the cross-state regional chamber frame.

Use as the first regional business network shortcut for Trinidad and neighboring counties.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalBusiness funding directory

Colorado Business Funding and Incentives

Colorado businesses comparing tax credits, grants, loans, rural incentives, and job-creation programs.

Use as the Colorado starting page before drilling into Rural Jump-Start, enterprise zone, or industry-specific programs.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Las AnimasNonprofit giving directory

Colorado Gives

Colorado nonprofit discovery, fundraising profiles, and donor-facing visibility.

Use when a nonprofit needs a public giving/listing path.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalNonprofit directory

Colorado Nonprofit Association Directory

Colorado nonprofit member lookup and peer organization discovery.

Use carefully: the directory states non-commercial use limits.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxBusiness data aggregator

Enigma Directory: Raton Business Entities

Supplemental entity discovery, addresses, websites, and business patterns.

Use for research leads only; do not treat as an official directory or endorsement.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxVisitor business directory

Explore Raton Shopping

Visitor-facing retail, handmade goods, local shops, and shopping-related Raton discovery.

Use when a business, maker, or artist can serve travelers or day-trip visitors.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalEconomic-development directory

Finance New Mexico Regional Economic Development Organizations

New Mexico regional economic-development organization lookup.

Use when Colfax users need support beyond a city-specific organization.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxNonprofit directory

Groundworks New Mexico Nonprofit Directory

Raton and Colfax nonprofit discovery, including arts, community improvement, and human services.

Use before manually collecting New Mexico nonprofit names.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxBusiness funding directory

New Mexico Business Portal Financial Assistance

New Mexico entrepreneurs comparing SBA funding programs, state finance options, and business assistance paths.

Use as a plain-language first stop before moving into SBA, NMFA, JTIP, LEDA, or local economic-development contacts.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxCreative economy directory

NM Creative Industries Resource Center

Creative businesses, spaces, galleries, studios, theaters, resource directorys, and statewide opportunities.

Use when artists or creative ventures need a statewide directory and listing path.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalEconomic-development resource directory

NM EDD Business Resource Map

Finding and submitting New Mexico business-support resources, funding assistance, services, and regional economic-development contacts.

Use this alongside city and chamber resources when a Colfax user needs a statewide business-support path or a resource needs to be submitted for review.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

RegionalBusiness recognition directory

NM Family Friendly Business Directory

New Mexico businesses that want family-friendly workplace visibility and peer discovery.

Use as a values-aligned visibility path, then verify application or listing rules.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxBusiness directory

Raton Chamber Business Directory

Finding Raton-area businesses, sponsors, chamber contacts, and local service anchors.

Check this before building a fresh Raton contact list.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxHealth and family resource directory

ROAMS Local Resources

Colfax, northeastern New Mexico, family support, prenatal/postnatal services, youth/family resources, and local service referrals.

Use for health, family, youth, and service-provider referrals that need a regional directory beyond business promotion.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxCommunity resource directory

SHARE New Mexico

New Mexico community resources, program locations, county pages, and grants/funding discovery.

Use for social-service, nonprofit, and community program referrals.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Las AnimasNonprofit directory

Southern Colorado Community Foundation Nonprofit Directory

Southern Colorado nonprofit search, grantseeker pathways, and volunteer profile discovery.

Use for Colorado nonprofit discovery before building a manual organization list.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoDirectory submission

Spanish Peaks Country Add Business Listing

Visitor-facing businesses that may belong in the Spanish Peaks Country directory.

Use to request a listing; do not promise acceptance without review.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoMunicipal business directory

Town of La Veta Business Directory

La Veta business names, addresses, phone numbers, and downtown/creative-economy anchors.

Use for La Veta outreach, cross-promotion, and referral lists.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxMunicipal business directory

Village of Eagle Nest Business Directory

Eagle Nest lodging, retail, galleries, outfitters, food, home services, and lake-corridor businesses.

Use to verify Eagle Nest leads and replace unsourced roster entries with public directory evidence.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoServices directory

World Journal Services Directory

Electricians, plumbers, real estate agents, local service firms, and service referrals.

Use for service-provider discovery and local advertising context.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

ColfaxCommercial directory

Yellow Pages Raton Business Listings

Supplemental public business lookup where official directories miss categories.

Use only as a secondary discovery source and confirm details elsewhere.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

HuerfanoServices directory

World Journal Services Directory

Electricians, plumbers, real estate agents, local service firms, and service referrals.

Open the page before assuming rates, free placement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance.

Promotion packet

Prepare once, submit many times.

  • Event or business name
  • Date, time, and location
  • One-sentence public hook
  • 50-word description
  • 100-word description
  • Website, ticket, registration, or contact link
  • Contact name, email, and phone
  • Square image
  • Vertical image
  • Printable flyer
  • Accessibility notes
  • Item type: free, ticketed, nonprofit, youth, tourism, business, or community

Anti-spam rule

Ask like a neighbor, not like a blast campaign.

Send only to channels where the item fits, use the channel owner's preferred form, avoid repeated messages, and stop when a page says submissions are closed or not accepted. For nonprofits and community programs, lead with public benefit rather than sales language.

Subject: Question About Promotion / Advertising Opportunities

Hello, I am reaching out to ask whether [organization/publication/site name] accepts event listings, newsletter submissions, business directory updates, paid advertisements, social media co-promotion, visitor-guide listings, or other community announcements.

The item is [business/event/program name]. It serves [audience] in [town/county] and the public action is [visit/register/contact/attend].

Could you point me to the right form, deadline, rate card, eligibility rule, or contact person? I can send a short description, image, flyer, and link in whatever format you prefer.

Best-use matrix

Match the channel to the thing being promoted.

Use caseBest first channels
Public event Event calendars, tourism calendars, venue lineups, and city/community calendars.
Visitor-facing business Tourism directories, visitor guides, chamber/tourism sites, and Google Business Profile.
Restaurant or retail special Newsletter opportunities, social media co-op, paid ad inquiry, and local flyers. Verify newsletter ad rules first.
Art show or performance Venue lineups, arts calendars, tourism calendars, and local media.
Nonprofit program City calendars, newsletters, radio PSA, schools/libraries, and partner organizations. Use community-announcement language.
Grant-funded project Media coverage, newsletter mentions, partner reposts, and post-event reporting. Track screenshots and reach when possible.
Seasonal tourism campaign Tourism sites, visitor guides, lodging partners, and regional newsletters. Ask about deadlines, eligibility, and paid/free status.

Common questions

Use channels with permission and fit.

Where should I post a public event first?

Start with event calendars, tourism calendars, venue lineups, city or community calendars, and partner channels that already serve the event's audience.

What local sources automatically accept free ad placements for public events?

Some public event calendars and community submission paths accept eligible public events without a paid ad buy, including The Chronicle-News community/event routes and tourism calendar forms where the source page allows submission. Still verify the current page rules, because free calendar listing, editorial coverage, classifieds, and paid ads are different things.

What should I prepare before submitting an event?

Prepare the event name, date, time, location, short description, contact link, images, flyer, accessibility notes, and whether the event is free, ticketed, nonprofit, youth, tourism, business, or community-oriented.

Listing updates

Suggest a channel

Use this when a calendar, newsletter, visitor guide, media outlet, directory, venue lineup, or partner channel should be added or corrected. Submissions are starting points for review, not automatic publication.

What to include

Name, county, community, website or source link, contact route, short description, audience served, and what action a reader should take.

Placeholder intake contact

Email: updates@statelineguide.example
Phone: (575) 000-0000
Mail: 000 Main Street, Raton, NM 87740

Open submission form

Next action

Choose the next practical route.

  • Search public directories and local leads
  • Separate official notices from community visibility
  • Use copy-ready outreach templates
  • Submit a changed channel with a public source link

Event promotion timeline

Submit early enough for the channel to use the information.

Calendars, newsletters, visitor guides, print outlets, and partner organizations often need lead time. Use this as a practical starting timeline and confirm exact deadlines with each source.

TimingActionProof to save
6–8 weeks beforeConfirm date, venue, description, image needs, partner roles, and accessibility notes.Venue confirmation and final event packet.
4–6 weeks beforeSubmit to tourism calendars, venue calendars, newsletters, and print outlets.Submission receipts, emails, and live calendar links.
2–4 weeks beforeSend media pitch, partner blurbs, social copy, and flyer distribution plan.Partner share links and media responses.
1 week beforeReconfirm listing links, update posts, send reminders, and check event details.Screenshot of published listings.
1–3 days afterThank partners, collect response notes, and save attendance/engagement proof.Photos, totals, comments, and follow-up contacts.

Paid versus free

Ask these questions before paying for placement.

QuestionWhy it matters
Who is the audience?A large audience is not useful if they are not likely customers, attendees, donors, or referral partners.
What action can the audience take?Visit, call, reserve, buy, register, donate, volunteer, or share should be clear.
Is the timing useful?Placement after the event, season, or launch window wastes money.
Is the placement guaranteed?Ask whether a listing, ad, mention, or post is confirmed before promising it publicly.
What asset size is needed?Prevents unreadable flyers, wrong image ratios, or rushed design files.
Can results be tracked?Use a unique link, QR code, referral question, coupon, or contact note.

Event type routes

Different events need different first channels.

Event typeBest first channelsPacket notes
Art openingGallery or venue page, tourism calendar, arts district, local mediaArtist names, reception time, image, sales/viewing details.
Live musicVenue lineup, tourism calendar, local media, performer/venue pagesPerformer, genre, age limits, ticket status, sound/venue notes.
FundraiserPartner organizations, community calendars, local media, nonprofit networksLead with public benefit and where funds go.
Workshop or classLibrary, gallery, school, community center, tourism calendar if visitor-facingAge range, cost, registration, materials, accessibility.
Market or festivalTourism calendar, chamber, venue, vendor networks, local mediaVendor info, parking, hours, rain plan, and contact route.
Business launchChamber, city economic development, visitor listings, local mediaOpening date, public offer, hours, and how to visit.
Back to top

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directory Submit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
